title: Ubiquiti UACC-Cable-DoorLockRelay-1P - UniFi Access connecting cable, 1 pair
description: A specially designed 2-wire cable for the UniFi Access system from Ubiquiti and is used to connect an electric or magnetic lock to the UniFi Access Hub. The cable is 152.4m long, consists of one pair of conductors and its white sheath is made of thermoplastic elastomer, which is flexible, soft and pleasant to the touch. Each wire has a cross section of 18AWG and is capable of carrying 2A at 36V DC Cable length: 152.4m Wire cross-section: 18 AWG (black, red) Sheath: TPE - thermoplastic elastomer, white color
